name: Pork Roast w Fennel and Sage
recipeInstructions:
1. Have butcher cut roast through most of bone to form individual chops.
2. Trim off most of fat. If necessary, tie roast to hold it together.
3. Sprinkle top and sides with salt, pepper, and fresh sage.
4. Place on rack in slow cooker; top with fennel. Cover and cook on LOW for 7-8 hours.
5. Remove roast and most of fennel; keep warm.
6. Turn slow-cooker to HIGH.
7. Dissolve cornstarch in wine. Stir into drippings.
8. Cover and cook on HIGH for 25-30 minutes or until thickened. Stir once or twice.
9. To serve, cut into chops. Spoon fennel over chops, then sauce over all.
